keyFeatures.en: AI-powered music creation and production tools
keyFeatures.zh: AI驱动的音乐创作和制作工具

keyFeatures.en: Collaboration features for musicians and producers
keyFeatures.zh: 音乐人和制作人之间的协作功能

description.en: Basic features such as AI-generated music samples, basic collaboration tools
description.zh: 基本功能，如AI生成的音乐样本，基本的协作工具

description.en: Advanced features such as unlimited AI-generated music samples, advanced collaboration tools, and priority support
description.zh: 高级功能，如无限AI生成的音乐样本，高级协作工具和优先支持

weaknesses.en: Limited customization options for advanced users
weaknesses.zh: 高级用户自定义选项有限

weaknesses.en: Collaboration features may not be as robust as those offered by competitors
weaknesses.zh: 协作功能可能不如竞争对手提供的功能强大

targetAudience.zh: 音乐人、制作人和音乐爱好者

positioning.en: openmusic.ai positions itself as a user-friendly AI tool for music creation and production, with a focus on accessibility and ease of use for both beginners and professionals.
positioning.zh: openmusic.ai将自己定位为易于使用的AI工具，用于音乐创作和制作，重点关注初学者和专业人士的易用性和便捷性
